commands.review_summary:
Adds a GitHub Actions Mantis PR desktop lease workflow, a Node handoff script, docs/changelog text, and tests for maintainer-triggered Crabbox Linux/macOS desktop leases.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a new maintainer automation lane. Source review and tests show the intended lifecycle, but the PR still lacks a real dispatch proof artifact.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers are live behavior proof and maintainer approval of a secret-bearing shared desktop workflow, not a narrow code repair.

target.title: feat(mantis): add PR desktop lease workflow
target.body:
## Summary
- add a Mantis PR desktop lease workflow for maintainer-triggered Crabbox desktop leases
- install a pinned Crabbox CLI from `openclaw/crabbox` before leasing
- post ready/status/failure handoff comments back to the target PR without exposing WebVNC credentials
- harden lease lifecycle around stale heads, inspect failures, terminal states, duplicate creation, and WebVNC bridge recovery

## Validation
- `node --check scripts/mantis/pr-desktop-lease.mjs`
- `node scripts/check-workflows.mjs`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/mantis-pr-desktop-lease.test.ts test/scripts/mantis-pr-desktop-lease-workflow.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean
- PR checks on `c1366c379a73c912563740506f93995ebb6a024c`: pass/skip only

## Proof status
- Not ready to undraft or merge yet.
- Live Crabbox mac proof is still blocked because this workflow is not available on the default branch yet, so GitHub returns 404 for `mantis-pr-desktop-lease.yml` dispatch.
- Local Crabbox mac proof is also blocked in this environment because AWS/Crabbox mac provider config is not available.
target.author: takhoffman
